inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from nut to bridge saddle in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from nut to bridge saddle in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Somundan köprü eşiğine milimetre cinsinden mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von Sattel zu Steg in Millimetern.

inputs.label: Number of Frets
inputs.businessContext: Total number of frets on the fretboard (used for context).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of frets on the fretboard (used for context).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Klavyedeki toplam perde sayısı (bağlam için kullanılır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Bünde auf dem Griffbrett (für Kontext).

inputs.label: Target Fret Number
inputs.businessContext: The fret number for which to calculate the distance from the nut.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fret number for which to calculate the distance from the nut.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Bundnummer, für die der Abstand zum Sattel berechnet werden soll.

inputs.label: String Gauge
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the string in inches (e.g., .010 for high E).

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the string in inches (e.g., .010 for high E).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel çapı (inç cinsinden, örn. yüksek E için .010).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser der Saite in Zoll (z. B. .010 für hohes E).

inputs.label: Tuning Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Target frequency for the string (e.g., E4 = 329.63 Hz).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target frequency for the string (e.g., E4 = 329.63 Hz).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel için hedef frekans (örn. E4 = 329.63 Hz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielfrequenz der Saite (z. B. E4 = 329,63 Hz).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
